requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Armenia's EV market is nascent but growing, with visible demand around Yerevan and used-EV imports. For new networked or tendered infrastructure, the practical direction is the IEC 62196 ecosystem used by European-aligned vehicles: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 CCS2 for DC fast charging. Connector conformity is both an interoperability requirement and a project requirement when written into SARM-adopted standards, PSRC / ENA conditions, tender documents, charge-point-operator requirements, or site-owner specifications.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚电动汽车市场仍处早期但正在增长，需求集中体现在埃里温及二手电动汽车进口。对于新的联网或招标基础设施，实际方向是欧洲体系车辆使用的IEC 62196接口生态：交流充电采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充采用IEC 62196-3 CCS2。当其写入SARM采纳标准、PSRC / ENA条件、招标文件、充电点运营商要求或场地方规格时，接口符合性既是互操作要求，也是项目要求。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞電動汽車市場仍處早期但正在增長，需求集中體現在埃里溫及二手電動汽車進口。對於新的聯網或招標基礎設施，實際方向是歐洲體系車輛使用的IEC 62196接口生態：交流充電採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充採用IEC 62196-3 CCS2。當其寫入SARM採納標準、PSRC / ENA條件、招標文件、充電點運營商要求或場地方規格時，接口符合性既是互操作要求，也是項目要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories, including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS2 configuration
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
SARM national adoption or project specification to be verified for the current tender

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T AC connector has a similar outline to IEC Type 2 but different connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangement. GB/T DC connectors are geometrically different from CCS2 and commonly use GB/T 27930 CAN communication. A GB/T-only charger is therefore physically and electrically incompatible with Type 2 / CCS2 vehicle inlets and charger networks.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口外形与IEC Type 2相近，但接口性别、信号和触点排列不同。GB/T直流接口与CCS2几何形状不同，且通常采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信。因此，仅支持GB/T的充电桩在物理和电气层面均不兼容Type 2 / CCS2车辆接口和充电网络。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口外形與IEC Type 2相近，但接口性別、信號和觸點排列不同。GB/T直流接口與CCS2幾何形狀不同，且通常採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。因此，僅支持GB/T的充電樁在物理和電氣層面均不兼容Type 2 / CCS2車輛接口和充電網絡。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger needs hardware change before Armenia Type 2 / CCS2 deployment: coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity pilot, control pilot behavior, DC communication stack, labels, spare parts, and IEC-family test evidence. Adapters are not a project-compliance substitute unless the project owner, utility, and safety assessor explicitly accept that design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩在亚美尼亚Type 2 / CCS2部署前需要硬件变更：耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近导引、控制导引行为、直流通信栈、标签、备件和IEC体系测试证据均需调整。除非项目业主、公用事业方和安全评估方明确接受该设计，转接器不能替代项目合规接口设计。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁在亞美尼亞Type 2 / CCS2部署前需要硬體變更：耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近導引、控制導引行為、直流通訊棧、標籤、備件和IEC體系測試證據均需調整。除非項目業主、公用事業方和安全評估方明確接受該設計，轉接器不能替代項目合規接口設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by SARM-adopted standards, PSRC / ENA conditions, tender documents, CPO requirements, or site-owner specifications; GB/T is physically incompatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is hardware and protocol work, not paperwork. GB/T connector chargers need redesign to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before they can serve Armenia projects that specify the IEC connector ecosystem.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议工作，而非文件替换。若亚美尼亚项目指定IEC接口生态，GB/T接口充电桩须改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2后才能使用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議工作，而非文件替換。若亞美尼亞項目指定IEC接口生態，GB/T接口充電樁須改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2後才能使用。
